cast.name: 阿查尔·乌斯曼 Azhar Usman

writer.name: 阿查尔·乌斯曼 Azhar Usman

introduction: UNTITLED AZHAR USMAN PROJECT is a refreshingly honest and ferociously independent standup film by veteran (yet indie and underground) standup comic Azhar Usman, directed by his longtime collaborator, Paul Elia. The one-time co-creator of "Allah Made Me Funny-The Official Muslim Comedy Tour" now finds himself working in Hollywood, inside the proverbial 'Belly of the Beast,' writing for successful TV shows, and even joining the Marvel Cinematic Universe. But who cares? From thoughtful ruminations on the nature of life and existence itself, to deeply confessional and personal stories, Azhar takes a startling (yet hilarious) look at his own fears, insecurities, and privately held beliefs, while trying to make sense of the crazy world around us. UNTITLED AZHAR USMAN PROJECT is a tour-de-force of spiritual wisdom, philosophical examination, and raw standup comedy, illustrating why Dave Chappelle once remarked: "Azhar is untouchable, he's like a comedian from the future."
